Grow with AITDL

Join India's most versatile technology partner network. Resell, implement, or white-label — your market, your way.

Mumbai · Nashik · Surat · Gorakhpur · and every city in between

Apply to Partner →

Three ways to partner

Choose the model that fits your business. Most partners start as resellers and grow into implementers.

🤝

Reseller

Sell AITDL products in your city or region. Earn recurring commissions on every renewal.

  • ✓ Territory protection
  • ✓ Sales training
  • ✓ Marketing materials
  • ✓ Lead sharing
🔧

Implementer

Install, configure and train clients. Build a services business on top of AITDL products.

  • ✓ Technical certification
  • ✓ Support escalation
  • ✓ Implementation toolkit
  • ✓ Priority helpdesk
🏷️

White Label

Build your own brand on top of AITDL infrastructure. Full customisation for your market.

  • ✓ Custom branding
  • ✓ Dedicated instance
  • ✓ SLA agreement
  • ✓ Joint GTM support
